title.en: After the Snow Girl left, Ye Tian cleaned up th...

content.en:
After the Snow Girl left, Ye Tian cleaned up the mess, and then left here.

The Snow Maiden gave him a lot of intelligence information, all of which were obtained from the masters of the Haihe River, including the hiding places of some members of the Futian Sect, after all, the master of the Haihe River was one of the deputy sect leaders, so he naturally knew a lot of information.

However, there are several members of the Futian Sect who do not know the information and hide deeply.

In addition, these members of the Resurrection Sect are very careful, if they delay for a long time, they will inevitably find a new hiding place if they cannot contact the upper echelons of the Resurrection Sect.

"These members of the Heavenly Restoration Sect must be killed first, and there must be no time to lose. "

Ye Tian immediately went to the hiding place of one of the members of the Futian Sect.

......

Origin Boundary Sea.

Flower Sea Sect.

This is a small force, the strongest is only a half-step Eternal Master, so this force is very insignificant, and it can only be confined to a small area, and it doesn't even know how big the outside world is.

At this time, the Second Realm Level Controller of the Futian Sect, the Ape Ghost Master, was hiding here, and he secretly controlled the half-step Eternal Controller of the Flower Sea Sect, so it was very safe and hidden to stay here.

As long as he doesn't leak his breath, no one will be able to find him.

Suddenly.

Time and space froze, and the ape ghost controller found himself imprisoned, unable to move.

Clearly, an Eternal Master of Strength far beyond him had come here and imprisoned him.

He had already guessed what this man was from.

"How is it possible, who leaked my information?"

He didn't have a chance to think too much, so he was annihilated by Ye Tian in the next moment.

And at the moment when the ape ghost controller fell, the half-step eternal master of the Flower Sea Sect regained his consciousness, and only then did he realize that he had been controlled by others all these years.

"The Eternal Master is dead. "

The half-step Eternal Master of the Flower Sea Sect arrived at the Ape Ghost Master's residence and found that he had been reduced to ashes, leaving only a little residue, knowing that he had been obliterated by some terrifying being.

Although the other party did not kill him, he also saved him indirectly.

"Thank you seniors for saving your life!"

The half-step Eternal Master of the Flower Sea Sect thanked.

However, Ye Tian had already left, and he didn't have time to stay here.

Time passed, and a member of the Futian Sect was found by Ye Tian, and then easily obliterated.

But in the end, there were still five members of the Futian Sect who disappeared and could no longer be found, and these were the only five remaining members of the Futian Sect.

Ye Tian didn't continue to chase and kill them, unless he bumped into them one day.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian publicized the information of these five members of the Futian Sect, and the five of them did not dare to come out to refute it, and since he announced it, many forces recognized this information.

Origin Boundary Sea, Deserted Holy Island.

Ye Tian came here, this was originally a mansion of the master of Quanshan, the master of the Eight Realms, it can be said that the cultivation environment here is quite good, and there are many resources for birth, it is one of the rare treasures.

Now, the master of Quanshan has fallen, and his Tongyang Mountain has been destroyed, so he is ready to occupy this place as one of his cultivation places.

At this time.

There were many cultivators in the Desolate Holy Island, and after Ye Tian descended, he directly announced that the master of Quanshan had fallen, and immediately occupied this place with strong strength, and no one dared to refute it.

Subsequently, Ye Tian took control of the magic circles here, and rearranged many magic circles, completely controlling this place.

Then, Ye Tian took out the Tongyang Pagoda and placed it here.

As soon as Tongyang Qiling saw that he had changed his environment, he couldn't help asking, "Master, where is this?"

"Wild Holy Island!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"What, Desolate Holy Island, this is the place where the Eight Realm-level controllers are the controllers of Quanshan, why are we here?" said Tongyang Qiling in a panic.

"The master of Quanshan has been killed by my senior sister, and this place is occupied by me, so you can stay here in the future. "

Ye Tian said.

"The master is awesome!"

Tongyang Qiling exclaimed.

After Ye Tian lived on the Desert Holy Island, he practiced here, and there were many cultivation time and space here, so Ye Tian didn't need to worry about it at all, and he completely picked up ready-made ones.

It didn't take long for the news of the fall of the members of the Futian Sect such as the controller of Quanshan to spread.

And many Eternal Masters also wanted to snatch the Desert Holy Island, but after learning that Ye Tian was here, they were cowardly one by one and didn't dare to snatch it.

After all, Ye Tian was able to burst out the combat power of the Seven Realm-level controllers, even if he was an eight-realm level controller, he wouldn't dare to offend the personal disciples of the Ten Elements Ancestor rashly!

And just like that, the matter gradually passed.

"Finally refined this statue of ten thousand phases!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This Wanxiang statue is a little different from the Wanxiang statue before him, although most of them are the same, but this Wanxiang statue focuses on defense, which can enhance Ye Tian's defense ability, and of course it also increases other aspects, but it doesn't increase defense as much.

However, if you urge the two Ten Thousand Phases Statue at the same time, the burden on the body is even greater, but the power of the increase is only increased by 30%, which is not as much as imagined.

"It seems that the difference in strength between the two Wanxiang statues and one Wanxiang statue is not too big, if you get three Wanxiang statues, the general eternal controller will not dare to urge it, otherwise the physical body will be directly shattered. Ye Tian thought to himself.

It was also because he devoured the Black Silent Sea and the Devouring Mountain, and the level of vitality was incomparably high, so he dared to urge the two Ten Thousand Phases Statue at the same time.

"Although the second statue of Ten Thousand Phases has only increased my strength by thirty percent, it has also increased my strength a lot, and with the second statue of Ten Thousand Phases, at least on top of the changes in the path of enlightenment, it can be accelerated a lot. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently, he continued to practice, and this time he could obtain a lot of resources from the Futian Sect, many of which could improve the body of control, which may not be looked down upon by the Snow Maiden, but it would be of great help to him.

If all these resources were refined, his body of control could definitely be raised to the level of a ninth-level body of control.

At that time, even if he didn't use the Ten Thousand Phases Statue, his strength would be infinitely close to that of the Seven Realms-level masters.

Time passed slowly, and before I knew it, the years of the Millions of Realms had passed.

Finally, on this day, after Ye Tian refined a catty of blood-source desolate divine liquid, the body of control finally broke the shackles and was promoted from the body of an eighth-level controller to a seventh-level body of control.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian's physical fitness has been terrifyingly improved, his physical body has become extremely powerful, and his strength has naturally skyrocketed.

At this time, his will has reached the peak of the ninth order, and his control body has reached the ninth order, which can be said to have almost reached the extreme of these two aspects, and he only needs to create a top-notch origin control technique to truly reach the realm of the seventh-level master, and when the time comes, with the help of two statues of ten thousand phases, it will be enough to compete with the eighth-level master.
